title: Dilute hydrochloric acid (Dil HCl)
author: Chaudhari, Manisha
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Dilute hydrochloric acid (Dil HCl) Manisha Chaudhari, HOD, Kokan Gyanpeeth Rahul Dharkar College of Pharmacy and Research Institute, Karjat Citation: 10.5281/zenodo.10827347 Also available at:  https://pharmacyinfoline.com/dil-hcl/  Important Tips About Dilute Hydrochloric Acid (dilHCl) Dilute hydrochloric acid (dil-HCl) is a colorless, aqueous solution of hydrogen chloride (HCl) and water. It is a common and versatile reagent used in various laboratory applications, industrial processes, and household cleaning solutions. This article explores the properties, preparation, safety considerations, and applications of dil-HCl.
